ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/WeKnora
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/WeKnora
Language: go
Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API is an open-source relay platform that unifies Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, and Antigravity subscriptions into a single endpoint. It supports account sharing and cost-sharing, with seamless native tool compatibility.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aldinokemal/go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
Language: go
GOWA - WhatsApp REST API with support for UI, Multi Account, Webhooks, and MCP, and Chatwoot. Built with Golang for efficient memory use.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bluenviron/mediamtx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx
Language: go
Ready-to-use Media-over-QUIC / SRT / WebRTC / RTSP / RTMP / LL-HLS / MPEG-TS / RTP live media server and media proxy that allows to read, publish, proxy, record and playback real-time video and audio streams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: docker/docker-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/docker/docker-agent
Language: go
AI Agent Builder and Runtime by Docker Engineering

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dstotijn/hetty
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dstotijn/hetty
Language: go
An HTTP toolkit for security research.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: envoyproxy/gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/envoyproxy/gateway
Language: go
Manages Envoy Proxy as a Standalone or Kubernetes-based Application Gateway

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gruntwork-io/terragrunt
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt
Language: go
Terragrunt is a flexible orchestration tool that allows Infrastructure as Code written in OpenTofu/Terraform to scale.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: juicedata/juicefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/juicedata/juicefs
Language: go
JuiceFS is a distributed POSIX file system built on top of Redis and S3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kai-scheduler/KAI-Scheduler
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kai-scheduler/KAI-Scheduler
Language: go
KAI Scheduler is an open source Kubernetes Native scheduler for AI workloads at large scale

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes/ingress-nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes/ingress-nginx
Language: go
Ingress NGINX Controller for Kubernetes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunchenguid/no-mistakes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunchenguid/no-mistakes
Language: go
git push no-mistakes

ns0:entry.ns0:title: m5stack/StackChan
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/m5stack/StackChan
Language: go
StackChan open source!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mikefarah/yq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mikefarah/yq
Language: go
yq is a portable command-line YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML, HCL and properties processor

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oauth2-proxy/oauth2-proxy
Language: go
A reverse proxy that provides authentication with Google, Azure, OpenID Connect and many more identity providers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/node_exporter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter
Language: go
Exporter for machine metrics

ns0:entry.ns0:title: terrastruct/d2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/terrastruct/d2
Language: go
D2 is a modern diagram scripting language that turns text to diagrams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trpc-group/trpc-agent-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trpc-group/trpc-agent-go
Language: go
A Go framework for building production agent systems with graph workflows, tools, memory, A2A, AG-UI, MCP, evaluation, and observability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trufflesecurity/trufflehog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog
Language: go
Find, verify, and analyze leaked credentials

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usememos/memos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usememos/memos
Language: go
Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vllm-project/aibrix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vllm-project/aibrix
Language: go
Cost-efficient and pluggable Infrastructure components for GenAI inference
